description: A cropped screenshot depicting an irregular green polygon, outlined in dark grey, against a blurred light brown or beige background. A small section of a yellow polygon is visible in the bottom right corner. This image illustrates a spatially mixed land cover scenario, where the green polygon likely represents a patch of vegetation within a larger land cover unit. The context suggests it is an example used for applying area thresholds in the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CLC+ Backbone Raster Product decision tree for pixels with mixed land cover at 10 m resolution.
